properties.name: Kaiserpfalz Franconofurd
properties.description: The historical heart of early Frankfurt. Emperor Charlemagne's seat of power.

properties.name: Römerkastell Saalburg
properties.description: A completely reconstructed Roman cohort fort located on the Upper Germanic Limes.

properties.name: Kaiserpfalz Gelnhausen

properties.name: Staufenmauer
properties.description: The ancient stone fortifications built to protect the core boundaries of Alt-Frankfurt.
